label: KaJota Mesh Escrow
description: On-chain USDC escrow for AI agents on Ethereum Sepolia. Lock funds against a listing, release on proof of delivery, or refund. No wallet keys required on the calling agent's side.

skills.label: Convert USD to USDC base units
skills.description: Pure compute: convert a human-readable USD amount into USDC base units (6 decimals).

skills.label: Read deposit state
skills.description: Read the on-chain state for a deposit by id (status, amounts, buyer, seller).

skills.label: Release escrow to seller
skills.description: Release escrowed USDC to the seller. Authorised by the service wallet matching the deployed escrow's releaseAuth.

skills.label: Refund escrow to buyer
skills.description: Refund escrowed USDC to the buyer. Authorised by the service wallet.
